author: cericeci
body:
#### PR description:
This is  (finally)  an update of #46663 to 16_X for the parallelized offline vertexing using Alpaka. I fidgeted for a bit trying to rebase the branch from the original PR to 16X and update there but it was doing more harm than anything so opted for opening a new one and closing the old one.

I'm a bit unsure about
https://github.com/cericeci/cmssw/tree/16_X_3DClustering_forPR/DataFormats/OfflineVertexSoA

I think it could be instead be placed
https://github.com/cericeci/cmssw/tree/16_X_3DClustering_forPR/DataFormats/VertexSoA  

though I tried to err on the side of caution as I'm not very familiar with the pixel vertex dataformats

#### PR validation:
Code checks passed and local validation works. The added code should not touch any existing workflows.
title: Parallelized offline 3D vertexing reconstruction
